title: HPQ, Novacium, and Pragma Industries Sign Agreement for Commercial and Industrial Green Hydrogen Production Using METAGENEâ„¢ Technology

It underscores the strategic interest of Pragma Industries â€” a long-standing hydrogen pioneer with over 20 years of experience â€” in integrating METAGENEâ„¢ stations into its sustainable mobility solutions, particularly to support last-mile transportation needs.
